attachments.fallback: MBOX vs PST: Which Format is Good? - @russowilson
attachments.text:
The MBOX format saves multiple emails in one file.

PST is created only in Outlook.

Tell me which format is good to save backup files?
attachments.title: MBOX vs PST: Which Format is Good? [How-to Discussions]

attachments.fallback: How to Convert OneNote to HTML? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: Exporting OneNote files to HTML makes it simple to view and share notes online. The MacSonik OneNote Converter Tool offers a secure and efficient way to <https://www.macsonik.com/blog/convert-onenote-to-html/|convert OneNote to HTML> while keeping formatting, data structure, and attachments intact. It supports batch conversion, saving time, and comes with smart filters for selective file export. In addition to HTML, the tool allows conversion to PDF, DO…
attachments.title: How to Convert OneNote to HTML? [How-to Discussions]
